title: Define COM Properties (call-in)
text: Define COM Properties (call-in) Define the call-in properties for COM implementations. Fields ProgID CLSID How to Define a Component Signature Related Links COM and DCOM To connect with COM components, Uniface makes use of the Microsoft's DCOM architecture. Uniface includes a COM connector that provides an interface with DCOM, thereby enabling Uniface components to call and be called by COM components. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
